news.title: Target is trying to win back busy families from Walmart, starting with the baby aisle
news.summary: Target is refreshing its baby category as part of a broader effort to offer better products and more convenience. Target is trying to compete with Walmart and Amazon.

news.title: Alphabet's 160% rally in a year reflects value of owning 'most of the stack' in AI
news.summary: Google was seen as an AI laggard in the early days of the AI boom. Investors are now betting that the search giant will be a clear winner.

news.title: Meet the YouTube whisperers, a booming class of advisors behind MrBeast and other million-dollar channels
news.summary: YouTube strategists are charging big money to YouTubers who want to expand their popularity. A burgeoning group of YouTube strategists is charging you money to expand your popularity.

news.title: With Netflix new ad-free standard plan at $20, streaming's tipping point into old TV is getting closer
news.summary: The economics of streaming are nearing the point where cheaper plans with ads make as much if not more money for services like Netflix. The company says it has no plans to change its ad-supported streaming service.

news.title: SEC delay on prediction markets ETFs echoes a long-fought bitcoin fund battle
news.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission has delayed approval for prediction markets ETFs. The delay brings up memories of the long battle over bitcoin funds.

news.title: Big Tech’s AI spending is depriving investors of juicy payouts
news.summary: Goldman Sachs expects S&P 500 share buybacks to grow only 3% this year. A shaky economic backdrop and AI cost pressures force spending reconsiderations.

news.title: My mother regrets paying Social Security. She says she should have invested her contributions. I disagree. Who’s right?
news.summary: “There’s no way my dad and my mom paid enough into Medicare to cover his six months in long-term critical care,” his daughter says.

news.title: ‘The S&P 500 seems to be doing particularly well’: I’m 66. Is this a good time to invest $100,000 in the stock market?
news.summary: “I own my home and I have no debt,” she says. “I’ve never been in debt in my life.”

news.title: Stocks are walking a tightrope to fresh record highs — as a handful of names do most of the heavy lifting
news.summary: Investors are caught on a tightrope. They are watching a very narrow band of tech stocks lift the stock market to fresh record highs. But they are looking down below for signs of trouble.

news.title: This Philly man has spent over $18,000 buying almost 100 Sixers-Knicks tickets for out-of-town basketball fans
news.summary: Fans need a Philadelphia ZIP Code to buy tickets to the Sixers-Knicks playoff series in Philly this weekend. One man told MarketWatch he’s helping out-of-towners because “it's part of being a fan.”
